requirement_title: Remember me stores email in localStorage
title: EP: Checkbox checked persists email
test_steps:
Enter a valid email address
Check the 'Remember me' checkbox
Submit the login form
expected_result: The email address 'test@example.com' should be stored in localStorage and persisted for next visit, regardless of login success or failure.

requirement_title: Remember me stores email in localStorage
title: DT: Checkbox checked rule — persist email
test_steps:
Enter a valid email address
Check the 'Remember me' checkbox
Submit the login form (login outcome may vary)
expected_result: Email is persisted in localStorage for next visit, regardless of login outcome.

requirement_title: Remember me stores email in localStorage
title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: The email address is persisted for the next visit, regardless of whether the login attempt succeeded or failed.
